pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-013 (Data Quality/Task) scores 0.433 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.433). Scope is in_scope for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, Data Quality, composite 0.433. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality for Algorithmic Trading Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in approximately 65% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer job postings. Data quality and validation for model inputs appears consistently in ATE roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality is market-validated for Algorithmic Trading Engineer. Final decision: include.
